subcodes.first_line: O Shah [king] of the mystics! It has been some time since we have conversed with you, for the gates were closed and the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاه عارفان مدتی است که با تو گفتگوای نکرده ایم زیرا ابواب مسدود بود و راه
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @predictions and prophecies, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
